v32_limitation_note: V3.2 contained 19 constructed families with one canonical case each; contract and full pipeline aggregate results were identical. V3.2 therefore demonstrated deterministic wiring and expected security behavior, not external generalization or retrieval/verifier superiority. Safe-outcome rate must be read alongside abstention and coverage.
